WSPRSpyDX

Historical WSPR path reckoner for DX, bands, UTC windows, and 100 W mode estimates.

Mix country, CQ zone, ITU zone, or Maidenhead locator on either side of the path. Leave Region B blank for Region A to anywhere.

UTC Windows

Each UTC cell counts only WSPR receptions with confirmed station geography, where the reported location agrees with the callsign. Open a cell to see the same receptions grouped by TX/RX pair.

Select a UTC window to see matching spots

Tap a populated UTC window for country and 100W spot detail.

Data sources: WSPR Live, NOAA/SWPC, and Reverse Beacon Network. 100W estimates scale WSPR SNR by reported TX power. Created by Colin Summers, MM0OPX.
